sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, data String, created_at DateTime, key Tuple(UInt64, UInt64));
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), data || cast(id AS String), 'suffix', 10, created_at) AS SipHash FROM test_table WHERE SipHash IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id, data, key ORDER BY SipHash;
SELECT id, sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), data || 'fixed_string' || CAST(created_at AS String), 0, 0) AS HashValue FROM test_table WHERE HashValue > 0;
SELECT id, sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), data || 'empty' || '' , 100, created_at) AS HashEmpty FROM test_table HAVING HashEmpty IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), 'prefix' || toString(id), data || NULL, created_at) AS CombinedHash FROM test_table WHERE toDateTime(NULL) < created_at;

CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), 'detail' || s1 || s2, 0, toDateTime('2023-01-05 00:00:00')) AS detailed_hash FROM (SELECT id, data AS s1, concat(NOT NULL, 's2') AS s2 FROM test_table) GROUP BY id, s1, s2;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), data || 'extra', 10, created_at) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, sipHash64Keyed((key.1, key.2), 'layer1' || (SELECT count() FROM test_table) || 'layer2', 20, created_at) AS NestedHash FROM test_table;
